Forge Pro Adjustable Dumbbell Set (5–25kg)

Finish: Matte Black

Quantity · Only 8 left

10-day returns 2-year warranty Free shipping

Most adjustable sets make you stop and fiddle with collars between every change. The Forge Pro doesn't — a quick-lock dial swaps the load in under two seconds, so the set fits into supersets and drop sets instead of getting in their way.

Each dumbbell runs 5kg to 25kg in 2.5kg increments, with a cast-iron core wrapped in a rubber coating that keeps plates from chipping floors or each other. The knurled handle is sized for a secure grip whether you're doing presses or farmer's carries.

Comes as a pair, with a compact storage tray that keeps both dumbbells and their loose plates organized at the base of a rack or in a closet.

Weight range5–25kg per dumbbell
Increments2.5kg per adjustment
Core materialCast iron, rubber-coated plates
HandleKnurled ergonomic grip, chrome shaft
Locking mechanismQuick-lock dial selector
Includes2 dumbbells + storage tray
Warranty1 year manufacturer warranty
Set weight~25kg total (both handles, mid-range plates)
